system.description:
### Tier 2 Skulk A synthetic trooper equipped with a tactical cloaking device and a powerful shotgun. Motives & Tactics: Ambush, jamming

#### Features Tactical Cloak - Action: The Geth Hunter becomes Hidden. While Hidden, they have +3 to their difficulty.

Radar Jamming - Passive: While the Geth Hunter is within Close range of a target, that target has Disadvantage on any rolls that rely on Tech or sensors.

Flanking Strike - Passive: If the Geth Hunter attacks a target that is already engaged with another Geth, it deals an additional 1d10 ene damage.

}}

{{adversary,
